recommendations.title: The Small Victories
recommendations.overview: Between her roles as mayor and teacher in the small village of Kerguen, Alice's days are very full. When an unexpected new student, 60-year-old Emile, finally decides to learn to read and write, her daily life threatens to become unmanageable. Especi

recommendations.title: In the Beginning
recommendations.overview: France, present day. A professional conman passes himself off as the boss of a construction site building a highway extension. He cons the whole region, hires dozens of workers and cynically enjoys the profits of his scam until he meets the lady mayo

recommendations.title: Where Do We Go Now?

recommendations.title: Sand Castle
recommendations.overview: Set during the occupation of Iraq, a squad of U.S. soldiers try to protect a small village.

recommendations.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
recommendations.overview: The Fantastic Mr. Fox, bored with his current life, plans a heist against the three local farmers. The farmers, tired of sharing their chickens with the sly fox, seek revenge against him and his family.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: The Little World of Don Camillo

recommendations.title: Alcarràs
recommendations.overview: In a small village in Catalonia, the peach farmers of the Solé family spend every summer together picking fruit from their orchard. But when plans arise to install solar panels and cut down trees, the members of this tight-knit group suddenly face ev

recommendations.title: Pad Man
recommendations.overview: Upon realizing the extent to which women are affected by their menses, a man sets out to create a sanitary pad machine and to provide inexpensive sanitary pads to the women of rural India.

recommendations.title: Misericordia
